---
title: "Mean-Field Theory and Coarse-Graining: Connecting Micro to Macro"
subtitle: "Track C — Agent-Based Modeling"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Mean-Field Theory and Coarse-Graining: Connecting Micro to Macro

**Track**: Track C — Agent-Based Modeling

The mathematical bridge between individual-based models and population-level equations. Covers how to derive ODE/PDE descriptions from agent rules and when such approximations are valid.

## Table of Contents

1. From Individuals to Populations: The Master Equation
2. Mean-Field Approximation
3. Moment Closure Techniques
4. Diffusion Approximations: Fokker-Planck and Langevin
5. Deriving PDEs from Agent-Based Models
6. Kinetic Theory and Boltzmann Equations
7. Multiscale Coupling: ABM + Continuum
8. Validation of Coarse-Grained Models

---

## Chapter 1: From Individuals to Populations: The Master Equation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Mean-Field Approximation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Moment Closure Techniques

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Diffusion Approximations: Fokker-Planck and Langevin

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Deriving PDEs from Agent-Based Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Kinetic Theory and Boltzmann Equations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Multiscale Coupling: ABM + Continuum

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Validation of Coarse-Grained Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
